header_description: Welcome to my website. I am a web developer dealing with creating applications in modern technologies. I create applications in
about_text_first: My name is Szymon and I am interested in creating web applications. My adventure with programming began in 2018 in the field of computer science at a technical college. Currently, I am a computer science student and in my spare time I create web applications in the organization
about_text_second: with a group of friends. Programming is my passion, but I am also interested in personal development and improvement of soft skills. In my free time I like reading books and playing sports.
